name: readgzh
description: Let AI read full-text WeChat Official Account articles. Cloud-based, zero-install. Supports standard articles and image-post formats.
author: readgzh

auth.description: Optional API Key for higher limits. Public endpoint available with rate limits.

tools.name: readgzh.read
tools.description: Read a WeChat article by URL, returning title, author, publish time, and full content

tools.name: readgzh.search
tools.description: Search cached WeChat articles by keyword

tools.name: readgzh.get
tools.description: Get a cached article by slug, with chunked reading and AI summary support

highlights: ☁️ Cloud-based — no local WeChat desktop installation required
💰 Shared cache — previously read articles are free for everyone
🖼️ CDN image proxy — permanent image access, no expiry
📱 Image-post support — full support for WeChat image-post format
🤖 AI summaries — structured JSON summaries via mode=summary (Pro)
